The '''Great Sea of Bandomeer''' was the sole ocean on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bandomeer/Legends|Bandomeer]]. It divided the entire planet's landmass nearly in half.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dark Rival]]''
